# Fine Glaze

> Fine Glaze is a leading aluminium facade contractor based in Pune, India. We specialise in curtain wall systems, structural glazing, ACP cladding, glass railings, skylights, louvers, and facade maintenance (AMC) for commercial, residential, and institutional buildings across Pune, Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, and Maharashtra.

## Company

- [About Fine Glaze](https://fineglaze.com/about): Company history, team, certifications, and the Fine Glaze story — established in Pune with 10+ landmark projects delivered.
- [Contact](https://fineglaze.com/contact): Office address (Undri, Pune 411060), phone (+91 8369233566), email (info@fineglaze.com), and enquiry form.

## Services

- [Aluminium Facade Systems](https://fineglaze.com/aluminium-facade): Unitized and stick-built aluminium curtain wall systems for IT parks, offices, and high-rises — wind-load tested up to 4.5 kPa.
- [Curtain Wall Systems](https://fineglaze.com/curtain-wall-systems): Unitized and semi-unitized curtain wall design, fabrication, and installation for commercial buildings.
- [Structural Glazing](https://fineglaze.com/structural-glazing): 2-side, 4-side, and spider glazing solutions for showrooms, offices, and retail facades — frameless silicone-bonded glass systems.
- [ACP Cladding](https://fineglaze.com/acp-aluminium-cladding): Fire-retardant PVDF-coated aluminium composite panel cladding from Aludecor and Alstrong.
- [Glass Railings](https://fineglaze.com/glass-railings): Frameless toughened glass railing systems for balconies, staircases, and terraces.
- [Facade Maintenance & AMC](https://fineglaze.com/maintenance-services): Rope-access facade cleaning, silicone resealing, glass replacement, and bi-annual inspection programmes.
- [Skylights](https://fineglaze.com/skylights): Structural skylight glazing for atriums, lobbies, and commercial spaces.
- [Louvers](https://fineglaze.com/louvers): Aluminium louver systems for ventilation and sun shading on building facades.
- [Glass Partitions](https://fineglaze.com/glass-partitions): Interior frameless glass partition systems for offices and commercial interiors.

## Portfolio & Projects

- [Project Portfolio](https://fineglaze.com/portfolio): Completed landmark projects including Embassy 247 (Vikhroli), LTIMindtree Mensa Campus (Mahape), Pune International Airport Terminal, and Salsette-27 (Byculla).
- [Commercial Building Facades](https://fineglaze.com/commercial-building-facade): Facade solutions for IT parks, corporate offices, malls, and mixed-use developments.

## Service Areas

- [Facade Contractor Pune](https://fineglaze.com/facade-contractor/pune): Serving Hinjewadi, Kharadi, Baner, Wakad, and Undri.
- [Facade Contractor Mumbai](https://fineglaze.com/facade-contractor/mumbai): Serving BKC, Andheri, Powai, and Vikhroli.
- [Facade Contractor Navi Mumbai](https://fineglaze.com/facade-contractor/navi-mumbai): Serving Vashi, Mahape, and Airoli.
- [Facade Contractor Thane](https://fineglaze.com/facade-contractor/thane): Serving Thane and surrounding areas.

## Guides & Blog

- [FAQ](https://fineglaze.com/faq): 11 expert answers on curtain wall costs, structural glazing pricing, ACP cladding, wind-load standards, and facade maintenance in India.
- [Blog](https://fineglaze.com/blog): Technical guides on facade engineering, cost comparisons, and industry trends in India.
- [Curtain Wall Cost Guide](https://fineglaze.com/blog/curtain-wall-cost-per-sq-ft-india-2026): Curtain wall pricing per sq ft in India (2026), covering unitized, stick-system, and semi-unitized options.
- [ACP Sheet Price Guide](https://fineglaze.com/blog/acp-sheet-price-per-sq-ft-india-2026): ACP cladding costs per sq ft in India with PE, FR, and PVDF grade breakdowns.
- [ACP vs HPL Cladding](https://fineglaze.com/blog/acp-vs-hpl-cladding-comparison): Technical comparison of ACP and HPL cladding materials for Indian projects.
- [Facade Design Trends 2026](https://fineglaze.com/blog/facade-design-trends-india-2026): Emerging facade design trends for commercial buildings in India.
- [Facade Maintenance Guide](https://fineglaze.com/blog/facade-maintenance-guide-india): Complete guide to facade AMC, cleaning schedules, and repair protocols for Indian buildings.
